---
title: "What’s New & Updated"
subtitle: "Posts about papers, events, news, and more"
#description-meta: "{{< meta description-meta >}}"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  page-size: 100
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true
#page-layout: full
draft-mode: unlinked
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
---

<!--This is my personal clarity, please delete or replace with your own clarity-->
{{< include /files/includes/_msclarity.qmd >}}
